TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Sowal no Satimolay-kanatanatal == O Sowal noSatimolay-kanatanatal a finacadan i Taywan O sowal no Yincumincu han no mita o 'Amis, Tolo polo ira ko tolo ko nika sasiromaroma no sowal, ano songila'en haca a misapinang ko kakakonis no polong nonini a sowal i, edeng malatolo ko tapangan no rayray ‚ÄĒono Tayal, ono Pariwan, ato no Cuwik. Safaw pito a 'ofadan no tamdaw ko cisowalay tonini a sowal. O roma sato, o sowal no Fotod a tamdaw haw i, o masapapotalay no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan i Taywan, o teloc no Patanik hananay a finacadan i Filiping cangra. O sowal no Misatimolay i Taywan i, o tadakakalimelaan no mikingkiway to sowal, enawhani, o ma'araway a kalo'a'adopen ato kalopinalomaloma no 'aya'ayaw a 'orip, ira a ma'araw i finacadan no Taywan. Itini a mahapinang a mafana' kita to o tatapangan nonini a Misatimolay kita o i Taywanay. Pakayni tonini a sowal ato ma'araway a kalomaamaan, paso'lin ko 'alomanay a hakasi^ no mikingkiway to sowal, o tatapangan no Misatimolay a finacadan ko Taywan saan. O micidekay a kasasiroma no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan itiniay i Taywan haw i, materek ko i 'aya'ayaway a katelangay a sowal ato rayray no 'orip no itiya:ay ho a tamdaw. O ngiha' no sowal, sepat ko tatapangan a ngiha',o padamaay a ngiha' haw i, ira ko masapinangay ato makalengay, nikaorira caay kasadak ko fali, caay ka matiya o ngarngar no holam ko sowal no Misatimoaly, o makakafitay ko tilid, ira ko lamit ira ko ciping,makakafit kora haw i, masapokopokoh ko tilid. Pakayniay i cefang no sowal i, o damac ko pakakafitay ta masapinang masongila'ay a tengilen ko sowal.
S.PHON: == so~uwa…ĺ no~u satimo~u…ĺaj-kanatanata…ĺ == o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~usatimo~u…ĺaj-kanatanata…ĺ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan i tajwan o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u jin ¶o~u~umin ¶o~u~u ńßan no~u mita o~u °amis, to~u…ĺo~u po~u…ĺo~u ira ko~u to~u…ĺo~u ko~u nika sasiro~umaro~uma no~u so~uwa…ĺ, ano~u so~uŇči…ĺa °…ôn ńßa ¶a a misapinaŇč ko~u kakako~unis no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~unini a so~uwa…ĺ i, …ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ma…ĺato~u…ĺo~u ko~u tapaŇčan no~u rajraj *o~uno~u taja…ĺ, o~uno~u pariwan, ato~u no~u ¶o~u~uwik. safaw pito~u a °o~ufa…¨~…ģan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u ¶iso~uwa…ĺaj to~unini a so~uwa…ĺ. o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u fo~uto~u…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw ńßaw i, o~u masapapo~uta…ĺaj no~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u misatimo~u…ĺaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan i tajwan, o~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u patanik ńßananaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan i fi…ĺipiŇč ¶aŇčra. o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u misatimo~u…ĺaj i tajwan i, o~u ta…¨~…ģakaka…ĺim…ô…ĺaan no~u mikiŇčkiwaj to~u so~uwa…ĺ, …ônawńßani, o~u ma °arawaj a ka…ĺo~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ato~u ka…ĺo~upina…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma no~u °aja °ajaw a °o~urip, ira a ma °araw i fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u tajwan. itini a mańßapinaŇč a mafana ° kita to~u o~u tatapaŇčan no~unini a misatimo~u…ĺaj kita o~u i tajwanaj. pakajni to~unini a so~uwa…ĺ ato~u ma °arawaj a ka…ĺo~umaamaan, paso~u °…ĺin ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a ńßakasi Ē no~u mikiŇčkiwaj to~u so~uwa…ĺ, o~u tatapaŇčan no~u misatimo~u…ĺaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~u tajwan saan. o~u mi ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôkaj a kasasiro~uma no~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u misatimo~u…ĺaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan itiniaj i tajwan ńßaw i, mat…ôr…ôk ko~u i °aja °ajawaj a kat…ô…ĺaŇčaj a so~uwa…ĺ ato~u rajraj no~u °o~urip no~u itija:aj ńßo~u a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u Ňčińßa ° no~u so~uwa…ĺ, s…ôpat ko~u tatapaŇčan a Ňčińßa °,o~u pa…¨~…ģamaaj a Ňčińßa ° ńßaw i, ira ko~u masapinaŇčaj ato~u maka…ĺ…ôŇčaj, nikao~urira ¶aaj kasa…¨~…ģak ko~u fa…ĺi, ¶aaj ka matija o~u ŇčarŇčar no~u ńßo~u…ĺam ko~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u misatimo~ua…ĺj, o~u makakafitaj ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ira ko~u …ĺamit ira ko~u ¶ipiŇč,makakafit ko~ura ńßaw i, masapo~uko~upo~uko~uńß ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. pakajniaj i ¶…ôfaŇč no~u so~uwa…ĺ i, o~u …¨~…ģama ¶ ko~u pakakafitaj ta masapinaŇč maso~uŇči…ĺa °aj a t…ôŇči…ĺ…ôn ko~u so~uwa…ĺ.
S.FORM: == Sowal no Satimolay-kanatanatal == O Sowal noSatimolay-kanatanatal a finacadan i Taywan O sowal no Yincumincu han no mita o 'Amis, Tolo polo ira ko tolo ko nika sasiromaroma no sowal, ano songila'en haca a misapinang ko kakakonis no polong nonini a sowal i, edeng malatolo ko tapangan no rayray ‚ÄĒono Tayal, ono Pariwan, ato no Cuwik. Safaw pito a 'ofadan no tamdaw ko cisowalay tonini a sowal. O roma sato, o sowal no Fotod a tamdaw haw i, o masapapotalay no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan i Taywan, o teloc no Patanik hananay a finacadan i Filiping cangra. O sowal no Misatimolay i Taywan i, o tadakakalimelaan no mikingkiway to sowal, enawhani, o ma'araway a kalo'a'adopen ato kalopinalomaloma no 'aya'ayaw a 'orip, ira a ma'araw i finacadan no Taywan. Itini a mahapinang a mafana' kita to o tatapangan nonini a Misatimolay kita o i Taywanay. Pakayni tonini a sowal ato ma'araway a kalomaamaan, paso'lin ko 'alomanay a hakasi^ no mikingkiway to sowal, o tatapangan no Misatimolay a finacadan ko Taywan saan. O micidekay a kasasiroma no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan itiniay i Taywan haw i, materek ko i 'aya'ayaway a katelangay a sowal ato rayray no 'orip no itiya:ay ho a tamdaw. O ngiha' no sowal, sepat ko tatapangan a ngiha',o padamaay a ngiha' haw i, ira ko masapinangay ato makalengay, nikaorira caay kasadak ko fali, caay ka matiya o ngarngar no holam ko sowal no Misatimoaly, o makakafitay ko tilid, ira ko lamit ira ko ciping,makakafit kora haw i, masapokopokoh ko tilid. Pakayniay i cefang no sowal i, o damac ko pakakafitay ta masapinang masongila'ay a tengilen ko sowal.
